title: Rangoon
content:
Just a changing sea of colour
    Surging up and flowing down;
    And pagodas shining golden, night and noon;
    And a sun-burst-tinted throng
    Of young priests that move along
    Under sun-burst-hued umbrellas through the town.
         That's Rangoon.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ella Wheeler Wilcox delivers a powerful performance in "Rangoon"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
